post-install-output: Add Suissetec\SsoAuthBundle\Authenticator\SsoAuthenticator to your firewall custom_authenticators in config/packages/security.yaml.
Adjust suissetec_sso_auth.authenticator.silent_login_routes for routes that should use dialog=0.

config/packages/suissetec_sso_auth.yaml.contents:
suissetec_sso_auth:
    sso_server:
        url: '%env(SSO_URL)%'
        app_id: '%env(SSO_APP_ID)%'
        api_bearer_token: '%env(default::SSO_API_BEARER_TOKEN)%'
        # Alternative auth instead of bearer token:
        # api_username: '%env(default::SSO_API_USERNAME)%'
        # api_password: '%env(default::SSO_API_PASSWORD)%'

    authenticator:
        login_path: '/sso/login'
        check_path: '/sso/callback'
        default_target_path: '/'
        failure_path: '/'
        silent_login_routes: []
